nbaNews.title: Giannis vents about Bucks, won't rule out return
nbaNews.summary: Giannis Antetokounmpo gave contradicting messages about his future after a disappointing Bucks season, expressing frustration with where the Bucks are at while...

nbaNews.title: Flagg's rookie season ends with sprained ankle
nbaNews.summary: Cooper Flagg, the No. 1 pick and Rookie of the Year favorite, sustained the injury early in the second quarter of the Mavericks' regular-season finale.

nbaNews.title: Sources: Kings to retain Christie for next season
nbaNews.summary: The Kings are retaining coach Doug Christie for next season, team sources told ESPN.

nbaNews.title: Kawhi sits out Clips' finale to rest for play-in
nbaNews.summary: Kawhi Leonard, who averaged 27.9 points, 6.4 rebounds and 3.6 assists during a mostly healthy season, sat out the Clippers' regular-season finale Sunday against...

nbaNews.title: Mikal Bridges extends streak after 23-second stint
nbaNews.summary: Mikal Bridges' consecutive games played streak reached 638 in Sunday's season finale, after the Knicks wing played all of 23 seconds before leaving the game.
